utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, and total_budget. The final coverage plan includes all 5 of these items. Each is specified with appropriate details: health_coverage includes both physical and mental health descriptions and costs; property_coverage describes coverage types, exclusions, and notes; travel_coverage lists multiple covered elements and benefits; additional_services enumerates enhancement services; total_budget has both monthly and annual totals with currency. Therefore, all 5 items are fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan includes three main categories: health_coverage ('Global Active Life02'), property_coverage, and travel_coverage. The ground-truth list does not contain any plan named 'Global Active Life02', so we must infer its closest equivalents based on features. The health coverage description mentions comprehensive preventive care, prescription coverage, telemedicine, gym reimbursement, and immediate specialist access — these features most closely align with the 'LifeFirst Standard Plan' for both physical and mental health, which has a rating of 9 for each. The property_coverage section includes liability protection, electronics coverage, temporary accommodation, and natural disaster coverage — this matches 'LifeFirst Standard Coverage' (rating 9) under property_protection. The travel_coverage section includes medical evacuation, trip cancellation, baggage protection, and adventure sports coverage — this corresponds best to the 'InsurePlus Standard Plan' (rating 10) under travel_insurance. The additional_services section lists telemedicine, concierge services, and priority claims, which map to 'Telemedicine Services' (rating 8) and 'Concierge Services' (rating 2) from the enhancement and travel services categories. Thus, the final mapping includes LifeFirst Standard Plan (physical), LifeFirst Standard Plan (mental), LifeFirst Standard Coverage, InsurePlus Standard Plan, Telemedicine Services, and Concierge Services.
